chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Revision Application No.102 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on office objection as at “A” For hearing of main case ------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Rashid, advocate for applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant does not press this criminal revision application on the ground that he will seek appropriate remedy available to him under the law. In view of such position, instant criminal revision application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
